do: Use primary (#1E3A8A) for large brand surfaces, headers, and key structure
Reserve accent cyan (#22D3EE) for a single focal action per view
Let surfaces breathe — generous whitespace over dense fills
Keep body text on #0F172A over light surfaces for full contrast
dont: Set text or UI copy in accent cyan — it fails the 4.5 contrast on white
Introduce a warm second accent; the system stays cool blue → cyan
Stack more than one accent element in the same region
